title: EquipDispatch — add Coinsurance % and Deductible $ to Verification
description: Add coinsurancePct (whole %) + deductibleAmount Decimal(10,2) to Order. Additive (deductibleStatus enum stays). Surfaces: OrderForm Verification card (numeric/decimal inputs, no native spinner), API create+PATCH w/ audit diffs, OrderShape/order-helpers, print ticket, reporting filter+dimension, seed data.
test_plan: Create order w/ Coins=20, Deduct=373.11 -> persists on reopen
PATCH each value writes audit-log diff
built: schema(coinsurancePct Int, deductibleAmount Decimal 10,2) + OrderShape/labels + order-helpers(pickDecimal+serialize) + PATCH route w/ audit diffs + Input atom(inputMode/prefix/suffix) + OrderForm verification inputs + print ticket fields + reporting(coinsurance & bucketed deductible dimensions+sort) + seed. typecheck clean, 27/27 tests, e2e PATCH round-trip 480.22 exact, all pages 200, no server errors.

title: EquipDispatch — add Plan ID, Plan Name, Plan Type to Verification
description: Add insurance plan detail fields from spreadsheet cols D/E/F: planMemberId (String — 11-digit identifier, kept as string to avoid float precision loss), planName (String free-text full plan name), planType (enum HMO | HMO_POS | PPO). Lives in the Stage 2 Verification card with the insurance selects.
test_plan: Set Plan ID/Name/Type on an order -> persists on reopen
PATCH each value writes audit-log diff
Plan ID accepts only digits (no native number spinner)
Plan Type segmented select (3 options) — HMO / HMO/POS / PPO
Print ticket shows Plan + Plan ID
Reporting groups/pivots by Plan type dimension
built: schema(planMemberId String, planName String, planType PlanType enum) + PLAN_TYPE_LABELS + OrderShape/labels + order-helpers serialize + PATCH route w/ audit diffs (nullableString + enum) + OrderForm verification block (Plan ID numeric Input, Plan Type SegmentedSelect, Plan Name full-width Input) + print ticket Plan/Plan ID fields + reporting 'plan' dimension + seed (PLAN_NAME_POOL, 274/373 seeded HMO 137/HMO_POS 60/PPO 77). typecheck clean, 27/27 tests, db push+generate+reseed OK, dev server up.
